jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Unacademy
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
